fields.title: Persistent Curated Memory
fields.description: Port Hermes Agent's Persistent Curated Memory to tau. Two bounded, file-backed markdown files (MEMORY.md 2200 char limit, USER.md 1375 char limit) stored in ~/.pi/agent/tau/memories/. Frozen snapshot pattern: load at session_start/session_switch, inject into system prompt via before_agent_start. Mid-session writes update disk only. Single 'memory' tool with add/replace/remove actions. Cross-process file locking (multiple pi instances). No security scanning for v1.
fields.close_reason: All subtasks implemented. Persistent Curated Memory ported to tau.
